system.flavor: Leaves shrivel. Hair Curls. Wounds fail to heal.
system.effect: Mark a foe in range. While marked, that character takes 2 piercing damage at the end of their turn and creates difficult terrain under themselves. Increase damage to 2d6 piercing, and increase difficult terrain to 3 adjacent spaces of your choice if any part of it is absorbed by vigor. That character may then save to end the mark.
